title: Help with board structure
excerpt: I work for a trucking company in retention. I will be calling John Doe and asking how everything is going and rating everything from 1 to 5 stars. I have 16 questions I will be asking all of this when he has been here 12…

posts.author: liza5495 (Elizabeth Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: I work for a trucking company in retention. I will be calling John Doe and asking how everything is going and rating everything from 1 to 5 stars. I have 16 questions I will be asking all of this when he has been here 12 days. Then when he is here 30 days I will call back ask same 16 questions then again at 60 then 90 days. I want to be able to see if we are getting better with John Doe or worse each time.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @liza5495 ,

I am a certified monday professional and would love to assist you in setting up the board structure along with a automated process.

You can directly reach out to me at aquibcs@outlook.com

Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @liza5495,

As you can see there are a lot of great partners here on the forums and I hope you’ve been able to receive the assistance you need. However, if you are still exploring some options allow me to introduce the team from CarbonWeb. We are a monday.com Channel Partner and specialize in custom solution development and process workflows.

We have actually built out an application called PhoneBurner that may assist in your efforts with calling. This would not solve your board structure but could increase your dialing efforts once your board is finalized.

If you would like to explore a solution with our team please schedule a time with me here: Consultation - Ricky
